name: UODO — Decyzje Prezesa Urzędu Ochrony Danych Osobowych
description: Search and analyze decisions of the Polish Data Protection Authority (UODO/Prezes UODO). Access GDPR enforcement decisions, fines, warnings, and reprimands. Built for Polish lawyers, DPOs, and legal researchers.

tools.name: uodo_search_decisions
tools.description: Search UODO decisions by keywords, case number, and date range

tools.name: uodo_get_decision
tools.description: Retrieve a full UODO decision by ID — metadata, verbatim operative part, and complete legal reasoning

tools.name: uodo_list_search_fields
tools.description: List available search fields and types for building advanced queries
